# ipzilon Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) IPzilon API base URL. Env: IPZILON_API_URL. Default: http://localhost:8000.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) IPzilon API token (ipam_...). Env: IPZILON_TOKEN.
